name: Random Mutation
description: The animal just happened to come out like that. For example, in T.M.N.T., Splinter was an unusually intelligent and skilled rat long before the accident that created the T.M.N.T. Roll on Wild Animal Education Table.

name: Accidental Encounter
description: Some strange stuff - radiation, energy, chemicals, biologicals, or other strangeness - causes the animal to mutate. Roll on Wild Animal Education Table.

name: Deliberate Experimentation
description: Some kind of laboratory experiment is performed on the animal that causes the changes. The animal's structure or genetics were purposely altered for some purpose. Roll percentile again to find out the character's current relationship with the creator organization, which also determines the character's educational level.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Family Member
description: Adopted and raised as one of a researcher's family. Still living in the home, mutually loves and is loved by family members. Treated as a human and feels humans are basically good. Educated equal to one year of college. Select two skill programs and 10 Secondary skills. Skill bonus +10% on scholastic skills only. Can buy any standard weapons, armour or equipment with 3D6 times $1,000 in savings.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Researcher's Pet
description: Raised in the home of a researcher as a pet. Still living in the home and fairly loyal to family members. Will resent humans somewhat but still attempts to find acceptance among mankind. Trained instead of educated (no skill bonuses). Automatically knows Mathematics: Basic, can read and write and speak native language. Select 14 Secondary skills. Can spend 1D6 times $1,000 on equipment.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Escaped Pet
description: Raised in the home of a researcher as a pet. Escaped and hostile, but not hunted with deadly force. Will be resentful of humans. Roll education as wild animal character.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Cruel Experiment
description: Brought up as an experiment. Trained and educated with cruel punishments. Will distrust humans. Education consists of 6 Physical skills and 12 Secondary skills. Escaped and now hunted by the organization. Has 2D6 times $500 to spend on equipment purchased before the escape.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Caged Animal
description: Raised as a caged, experimental animal. Escaped and wants to destroy the organization. Has a strong distrust (and possibly hatred) of all humans. Roll education as wild animal character.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Educated Human-Equivalent
description: Educated and trained as if the character were a normal human. Has good relationships and a balanced outlook on humans. Education is equal to one year of college. Select two skill programs and 8 Secondary skills. Skill bonus +10% on scholastic skills only. Separate from the organization but with a good relationship. Can buy weapons, armour and equipment with 2D6 times $2,000 in savings.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Rescued by Researcher
description: Rescued from the organization and adopted by a friendly researcher at a young age. Raised while continuously being hunted by the organization. Distrusts humans but knows some are good and deserve friendship. Knows 4 scholastic skills (communications, computer, physical, pilot basic, science or technical), 3 military/espionage skills and 10 Secondary skills. Skill bonus +8% on scholastic skills only. Savings are 2D6 times $200.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Trained Specialist
description: Highly trained and educated as a specialist using the character's natural abilities. Education equal to a Bachelor's Degree. Select 3 skill programs and 10 Secondary skills. Skill bonus +25% on all scholastic skills only. Character is a valued employee of the organization and paid at least triple the going rate (minimum $75,000 per year). Character has saved 1D6 times $10,000.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Escaped Slave
description: Highly trained as a specialist using the character's natural abilities. Education is equal to three years of college. Select 3 skill programs and 8 Secondary skills. Skill bonus +15% on all scholastic skills only. Was treated as a slave and eventually escaped. Has stolen 3D6 times $10,000 worth of cash and equipment. Distrusts most humans and is hunted by law enforcement agencies and the organization.

name: Deliberate Experimentation - Trained Assassin
description: Deliberately raised as an assassin or warrior. Knows 8 Secondary skills and choice of Expert, Martial Arts, or Assassin Hand to Hand combat. +15% bonus in all Military skills. Knows and respects some humans but distrusts all large organizations. Escaped the organization and is now considered very dangerous, hunted by law enforcement agencies and the organization. Took 1D6 times $20,000 worth of equipment and weapons before escaping.
